## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Linked issues

<!-- "Closes #123" / "Relates to #456" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Include commands, screenshots, or recordings.
     "I ran X query and observed Y" beats "tested locally". -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test (describe)

## Schema or migration changes

<!-- If you edited prisma/schema.prisma, a matching migration must exist in
     prisma/migrations/. Did rollback get tested? Are the new columns
     backwards-compatible with the previous app version? -->

## Telemetry impact

<!-- Will this change EventLog metrics, Sentry error rates, or cost-relevant
     metrics (Exa calls, LLM tokens)? Anything we should watch on rollout? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests are added or existing tests cover the change.
- [ ] No new secrets, API keys, or PII are committed.
- [ ] User-facing copy follows the project's voice (calm, candid, specific).
